title: Video shows ships turning away from the Strait of Hormuz as confusion persists over whether sea lane is really open
summary: Despite Iran's Friday declaration that the Strait of Hormuz is open, maritime freight and oil analysts told CNBC the critical sea lane remains effectively closed. Ships continue turning away from the passage, creating confusion about access to one of the world's most important oil transit routes. This uncertainty matters because the Strait handles roughly one-third of global seaborne oil trade.
content: The Strait of Hormuz remained effectively closed despite Iran's declaration Friday that it is open, maritime freight and oil analysts told CNBC.

zh.title: 视频显示船舶正在远离霍尔木兹海峡，人们对该海道是否真正开放存在困惑
zh.summary: 尽管伊朗周五宣布霍尔木兹海峡开放，但海运和石油分析师告诉美国全国广播公司，这条关键海道实际上仍然关闭。船舶继续远离这条通道，对全球最重要的石油运输路线之一的通行造成了混淆。这种不确定性很重要，因为该海峡处理大约全球海运石油贸易的三分之一。

title: Mortgage rates show signs of falling after Iran war peak
summary: Mortgage rates are showing signs of decline following the peak of tensions in the Iran conflict. Major lenders have begun reducing their rates as markets respond positively to signs of a potential truce. This development could provide relief to homebuyers and refinancers facing higher borrowing costs.
content: Major lenders make rate reductions as markets take some heart from a possible truce in the Iran war.

zh.title: 伊朗战争高峰后抵押贷款利率显示下降迹象
zh.summary: 在伊朗冲突紧张局势达到顶峰后，抵押贷款利率显示出下降的迹象。随着市场对潜在停火迹象做出积极反应，主要贷款人已开始降低利率。这一发展可能会为面临更高借贷成本的购房者和再融资者带来缓解。

title: 'I'm the lucky one' - more than one in three young men now live with their parents
summary: More than one-third of men aged 20-34 now live with their parents, marking the highest proportion since at least 2007. The increase reflects the mounting pressures of rising living costs on young adults' ability to achieve housing independence. This demographic shift has significant implications for housing markets, consumer spending patterns, and family dynamics.
content: Last year, the highest proportion of men aged 20-34 were still living at home since at least 2007 as the rising cost of living takes hold.

zh.title: 我很幸运——现在超过三分之一的年轻男性与父母同住
zh.summary: 现在超过三分之一的20-34岁男性与父母同住，这是自2007年以来的最高比例。这一增长反映了生活成本上升对年轻人实现住房独立能力的越来越大的压力。这种人口结构变化对房地产市场、消费支出模式和家庭动态有重大影响。

title: AMD, Oracle, Microsoft and the IGV lead a monster week for tech stocks
summary: Oracle, AMD, and Microsoft delivered strong performances this week, driving a significant rally in tech stocks. Semiconductor stocks including Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell, and ON Semiconductor have also surged in April. This broad-based strength suggests renewed investor confidence in the technology sector.
content: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft had major benchmarks, while Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor have all roared in April.

zh.title: AMD、甲骨文、微软和IGV在科技股疯狂周中领跑
zh.summary: 甲骨文、AMD和微软本周表现强劲，推动科技股大幅上涨。包括英特尔、博通、美光、美满电子和恩智浦在内的半导体股票在四月份也大幅上升。这种广泛的强劲表现表明投资者对科技行业的信心重新增强。

title: Cal-Maine’s stock falls as DOJ reportedly weighs bigger crackdown on major egg producers
summary: Cal-Maine Foods' stock is declining as the Department of Justice reportedly considers a broader crackdown on major egg producers. While egg prices have retreated from their March peak above $6 as farmers replenished flocks, regulatory action poses new risks. The potential antitrust scrutiny reflects ongoing concerns about market concentration in the poultry industry.
content: Egg prices crossed the $6 barrier in March of last year, but they have since fallen as farmers have replenished their flocks.

zh.title: 美国司法部据报考虑对主要蛋类生产商进行更大打击，凯蒙食品股价下跌
zh.summary: 美国司法部据报考虑对主要蛋类生产商进行更大打击，凯蒙食品股价因此下跌。虽然随着养殖户补充鸡群，蛋类价格已从三月份6美元以上的峰值回落，但监管行动构成新的风险。潜在的反垄断审查反映了对家禽行业市场集中度持续存在的担忧。

title: I’m selling my law practice and retiring. Do I pay off the $2 million mortgage on my office building — or rent it out?
summary: A retiring lawyer faces a decision on whether to pay off a $2 million mortgage on their office building or convert it to a rental property. The choice involves significant capital deployment and potential family disagreement about equity concentration.
content: “My wife is not a fan of tying up $2 million of equity in one building.”

zh.title: 我要出售律师事务所并退休。我应该偿还办公楼200万美元抵押贷款——还是将其出租？
zh.summary: 一位即将退休的律师面临决定：是偿还办公楼上的200万美元抵押贷款，还是将其改为出租物业。这个选择涉及重大资本配置和潜在的家庭股权分歧。

title: Jim Cramer on the market's 'remarkable' rally — and what to watch in a big earnings week ahead
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer describes the current market rally as one of the most "remarkable" he has witnessed. As investors head into a significant earnings week, Cramer provides guidance on what to watch for in corporate results. His comments underscore optimism about the market's recent recovery to new heights.
content: Jim Cramer says this is one of the most "remarkable" rallies he's seen, and provides guidance for the week ahead.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默评市场"非凡"涨势——以及在重要财报周前要关注的内容
zh.summary: 美国CNBC的吉姆·克莱默将目前的市场涨势描述为他所见证过的最"非凡"的。随着投资者进入重要的财报周，克莱默提供了关于如何关注公司业绩的指导。他的评论强调了对市场最近恢复到新高的乐观态度。

title: ‘I hope to retire at 59’: I have $950,000 in my 401(k)s. When do I do a Roth conversion?
summary: A retirement planner addresses a reader's question about executing Roth conversions with $950,000 in 401(k) savings while planning to retire at 59. The adviser emphasizes that Roth conversions are permanent and irreversible decisions requiring careful planning. Timing these conversions correctly is crucial to optimizing long-term tax efficiency in retirement.
content: Roth conversions are permanent. Once done, they cannot be undone.

zh.title: "我希望在59岁时退休"：我有95万美元的401(k)。我什么时候进行罗斯转换？
zh.summary: 一位退休规划师回答了一位读者关于以95万美元401(k)储蓄执行罗斯转换并计划在59岁退休的问题。顾问强调，罗斯转换是永久且不可逆转的决定，需要仔细规划。正确安排这些转换的时间对于优化退休时的长期税务效率至关重要。

title: Why do older sellers get less money for their homes than younger sellers?
summary: A new analysis examines why older homeowners typically receive less money for their properties compared to younger sellers. The disparity reflects complex factors in one of families' most significant financial decisions. Understanding these age-related valuation differences is important for older homeowners navigating the real estate market.
content: Buying and selling a home can be the most significant financial decisions that families face.

zh.title: 为什么年长的卖家比年轻卖家获得更少的房屋收入？
zh.summary: 一项新的分析研究了为什么年长的房主通常比年轻卖家获得较少的房产收入。这种差异反映了家庭最重要财务决定之一中的复杂因素。理解这些与年龄相关的估值差异对于年长房主在房地产市场中导航很重要。

title: ‘I have more money than I know what to do with’: I’m a single millionaire with no heirs and don’t like spending. What’s wrong with me?
summary: A financially successful single millionaire with no heirs seeks advice about their reluctance to spend money despite having substantial wealth. The questioner's frugal habits, including thrift store shopping, highlight a disconnect between means and consumption. This scenario raises questions about the psychology of wealth accumulation versus quality of life.
content: “I buy clothes at thrift stores.”

zh.title: "我有比我知道怎么花的更多的钱"：我是一个单身百万富翁，没有继承人，不喜欢花钱。我怎么了？
zh.summary: 一位在经济上成功的单身百万富翁，没有继承人，寻求关于尽管拥有大量财富但不愿花钱的建议。提问者的节俭习惯，包括在二手店购物，突出了经济能力和消费之间的脱节。这个场景引发了关于财富积累心理与生活质量的问题。

title: Meta reportedly eyes more layoffs, targeting 10% of staff
summary: Meta is reportedly planning additional layoffs affecting approximately 10% of its workforce, or around 8,000 employees, scheduled for May. The cuts come as the social media giant continues to invest heavily in artificial intelligence products and capabilities. This move signals Meta's strategic pivot toward AI while reducing its overall headcount.
content: The social-media giant is aiming to cut around 8,000 employees in May as it continues to invest heavily in AI products.

zh.title: Meta 据报计划裁员10%的员工
zh.summary: Meta 据报计划进行额外裁员，影响约10%的员工（约8000人），定于5月进行。这次裁员发生在这家社交媒体巨头继续在人工智能产品和能力上加大投资之际。此举标志着Meta向AI的战略转向，同时减少整体员工数量。

title: Nvidia rival Cerebras is taking another swing at an IPO
summary: Cerebras, an AI-chip company competing with Nvidia, is pursuing an initial public offering after abandoning a previous attempt in late 2024. The renewed IPO effort reflects growing investor appetite for AI-focused semiconductor companies. The timing suggests confidence in the company's technology and market positioning as AI demand accelerates.
content: The AI-chip company last filed to go public in late 2024 before scrapping its plans.

zh.title: Nvidia竞争对手Cerebras再次尝试IPO
zh.summary: AI芯片公司Cerebras在2024年底放弃上市尝试后，正在重新追求首次公开募股。重启IPO反映了投资者对AI芯片半导体公司日益增长的兴趣。这个时机表明随着AI需求加速，该公司对自身技术和市场地位充满信心。

title: Average tax refund is 11.2% higher, latest IRS filing data shows
summary: The average tax refund this filing season is 11.2% higher compared to previous years, according to newly released IRS data. The increase benefits millions of taxpayers who receive annual refunds. This uptick has implications for household spending patterns and consumer confidence as refunds reach people's bank accounts.
content: The average tax refund is 11.2% higher this season, according to the latest IRS filing data. Here's what taxpayers need to know.

zh.title: 最新IRS数据显示平均退税增加11.2%
zh.summary: 根据最新发布的IRS数据，本税务年度的平均退税相比往年增加了11.2%。这一增长惠及数百万获得年度退税的纳税人。随着退税进入人们的银行账户，这一增幅对家庭支出模式和消费者信心产生影响。

title: Earnings poised to stoke confidence in a stock market that has rebounded to all-time highs. Here's what's ahead
summary: With the stock market rebounding to all-time highs, upcoming earnings reports are expected to reinforce investor confidence in equities. Recent geopolitical developments and signs of resolution in the Iran conflict are contributing to optimism that equity markets may have reached their bottom. Analysts believe strong earnings could further validate the current rally's strength.
content: The fast-moving developments on the warfront add to confidence in many parts of the Street that the bottom is in for equities.

zh.title: 财报有望在股市反弹至历史新高后增强信心。接下来会发生什么
zh.summary: 随着股市反弹至历史新高，即将发布的财报预计将强化投资者对股票的信心。最近的地缘政治局势发展和伊朗冲突解决的迹象正在推高市场对股市可能已触底的乐观情绪。分析人士认为，强劲的财报业绩可能会进一步证实当前反弹的强度。

title: These stocks reporting next week are seeing their earnings momentum rise
summary: Several companies reporting earnings in the coming week are experiencing accelerating earnings momentum, positioning them for potentially strong results. Vertiv and Amazon are among the stocks seeing rising earnings momentum heading into their reports. This positive earnings trajectory could drive outperformance for these companies amid the broader market rally.
content: Stocks reporting earnings next week that are also seeing accelerating earnings momentum include Vertiv and Amazon.

zh.title: 下周报告业绩的这些股票正在经历收益动力上升
zh.summary: 在即将一周内报告收益的几家公司正在经历加速的收益动力，这将使它们有可能取得强劲成果。Vertiv和Amazon等股票在其财报发布前收益动力正在上升。这种积极的收益轨迹可能会在更广泛的市场反弹中推动这些公司的表现优于预期。

title: Banks weathered the storm of the Iran war. How did they do it and can they keep doing it?
summary: Bank earnings this week confirmed that while the Iran conflict created geopolitical upheaval, it has not translated into financial turmoil for the banking sector so far. Major lenders demonstrated resilience during the period of heightened tension, suggesting robust risk management practices. The critical question remains whether banks can maintain this insulation if geopolitical tensions escalate further.
content: Bank earnings confirmed one thing this week: The Iran war may be a geopolitical upheaval, but not a financial one. At least not yet.

zh.title: 银行经受住了伊朗战争的风暴。他们是如何做到的，能否继续做到？
zh.summary: 本周银行业财报确认，虽然伊朗冲突造成了地缘政治动荡，但迄今为止尚未转化为银行业的财务混乱。主要贷款机构在高度紧张时期表现出了韧性，这表明他们具有健全的风险管理做法。关键问题是，如果地缘政治紧张局势进一步升级，银行能否维持这种隔离。

title: Perspective: AI demand is inflated, and only Anthropic is being realistic
summary: Industry token usage metrics for AI suggest explosive growth but may significantly overstate actual demand. Anthropic stands out for maintaining a more conservative approach to growth projections compared to competitors.
content: The main usage metric for artificial intelligence, called tokens, looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated.

zh.title: 观点：人工智能需求被夸大，只有Anthropic保持现实态度
zh.summary: 人工智能行业的代币使用指标表明增长迅速，但可能大幅高估实际需求。与竞争对手相比，Anthropic因采取更保守的增长预测方法而脱颖而出。

title: Tanker diplomacy: Trump faces tests from Havana to Hormuz
summary: President Trump faces emerging geopolitical pressures ranging from Cuba to the Persian Gulf, with tanker-related disputes and maritime commerce becoming key diplomatic challenges. These regional tensions span multiple strategic flashpoints.
content: From Cuba to the Persian Gulf, Trump is expected to face fresh challenges across a new arc of tanker diplomacy.

zh.title: 油轮外交：特朗普面临从哈瓦那到霍尔木兹海峡的考验
zh.summary: 特朗普总统面临从古巴到波斯湾的新兴地缘政治压力，油轮相关争议和海上贸易成为关键的外交挑战。这些地区紧张局势跨越多个战略焦点。

title: AI chipmaker Cerebras set to file for IPO as soon as today
summary: Cerebras, an AI chipmaker, is filing for IPO with potential valuation 3x higher than its 2025 funding round, reflecting investor enthusiasm for AI infrastructure plays.
content: Through the public offering, Cerebras could be worth three times more than what it was in a 2025 funding round, one person said.

zh.title: AI芯片制造商Cerebras即将在今天申报IPO
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras正在申报IPO，其潜在估值比2025年融资轮高3倍，反映了投资者对AI基础设施的热情。

title: Here's what we like about our two newest additions to the Bullpen watchlist
summary: CNBC's Investing Club releases the Homestretch, a weekday afternoon stock update providing actionable insights during the final hour of trading.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 这就是我们为何喜欢Bullpen观察名单中的这两个最新添加项目
zh.summary: CNBC的投资俱乐部发布《最后冲刺》，一份工作日午后的股票更新，在交易最后一小时提供可行的见解。

title: Goldman says buy these dividend-paying energy stocks with upside potential
summary: Goldman Sachs recommends buy-rated energy stocks that combine dividend yields with price appreciation potential, offering multiple income streams for investors.
content: The firm called out a slate of buy-rated stocks that offer a combination of dividends and potential price appreciation.

zh.title: 高盛表示购买这些有上升潜力的分红能源股
zh.summary: 高盛建议买入评级的能源股，这些股票将分红收益与价格升值潜力相结合，为投资者提供多个收入流。

title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller cited the Iran war and labor market challenges as complicating factors in determining the central bank's interest rate strategy.
content: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

zh.title: 美联储理事沃勒称伊朗战争和劳动力市场风险使央行保持观望
zh.summary: 美联储理事克里斯托弗·沃勒引用伊朗战争和劳动力市场挑战,作为央行确定利率策略时的复杂因素。

title: Fed’s Waller turns cautious on rate cuts and worries about a ’lasting increase in inflation’
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Chris Waller warned that oil price surges from the Iran conflict and lingering tariff effects could create lasting inflation, potentially preventing further rate cuts.
content: Federal Reserve Governor Chris Waller said the surge in oil prices tied to the Iran war and lingering effects from U.S. tariffs  could “lead to a more lasting increase in inflation,” potentially forcing the central bank to eschew further interest-rate cuts.

zh.title: 美联储沃勒对降息态度转谨慎,担忧"持久通胀增加"
zh.summary: 美联储理事克里斯·沃勒警告,伊朗冲突导致的油价飙升和持续的关税影响可能造成持久通胀,可能阻止进一步降息。

title: Airline and cruise stocks soar, as ‘TACO’ gives way to ‘trust in Trump alone’
summary: Airline and cruise stocks rally sharply as investors bet the Trump administration can achieve Middle East peace following the Iran-Israel ceasefire.
content: United Airlines and Royal Caribbean shares were leading the S&P 500’s gainers as investors “trust in Trump” to deliver peace.

zh.title: 航空公司和邮轮股票飙升,因为"TACO"让位于"仅信任特朗普"
zh.summary: 航空公司和邮轮股票大幅上涨,因为投资者押注特朗普政府能在伊朗-以色列停火后实现中东和平。

title: The historic surge in chip stocks highlights Micron’s valuation, and a related warning
summary: The semiconductor ETF surged 34% in its strongest 13-day performance in 24 years, raising valuation concerns for chip stocks including Micron amid the broader sector rally.
content: The iShares Semiconductor ETF has rocketed 34% amid a long winning streak — its best 13-day stretch in 24 years.

zh.title: 芯片股历史性飙升凸显美光估值问题及相关警告
zh.summary: 半导体ETF在24年来表现最强的13天内飙升34%，在更广泛的行业涨势中引发了对包括美光在内的芯片股估值的担忧。

title: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
summary: Tinder and Zoom are implementing iris-scanning technology to verify users' identities and prevent fake accounts and AI-driven scams on their platforms.
content: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.

zh.title: Tinder和Zoom提供"人类证明"虹膜扫描技术以对抗AI
zh.summary: Tinder和Zoom正在实施虹膜扫描技术来验证用户身份，防止其平台上出现虚假账户和AI驱动的欺诈。

title: Anthropic's Dario Amodei to meet with White House about Mythos
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is meeting with the White House to discuss Mythos, occurring weeks after the Trump administration blacklisted the AI company.
content: The meeting comes less than two months after President Donald Trump blacklisted Anthropic.

zh.title: Anthropic首席执行官Dario Amodei将与白宫会面讨论Mythos
zh.summary: Anthropic首席执行官Dario Amodei将与白宫会面讨论Mythos，这发生在特朗普政府将这家AI公司列入黑名单数周之后。

title: What’s next for investors after the stock market’s rebound?
summary: MarketWatch's Weekend Reads explores post-rebound investment strategies, including options trading tactics, software stock opportunities, and Social Security optimization.
content: Also in Weekend Reads: Options-trading tactics, software stocks and a spousal Social Security switch.

zh.title: 股市反弹后投资者下一步该怎么办？
zh.summary: MarketWatch的周末阅读探讨反弹后的投资策略，包括期权交易策略、软件股票机会和社会保障优化。

title: AI minister Kendall says she doesn't use AI at work
summary: UK Science Secretary Kendall announced a £500m fund to boost British AI firms while disclosing she personally does not use AI in her daily work.
content: The Science, Innovation and Technology Secretary this week unveiled a £500m fund to boost British AI firms.

zh.title: AI部长肯德尔表示工作中不使用AI
zh.summary: 英国科学大臣肯德尔宣布5亿英镑基金促进英国AI企业发展，同时披露她本人在日常工作中不使用AI。

title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open to shipping but Trump says U.S. blockade still active
summary: Iran declared the critical Strait of Hormuz open for shipping, but the Trump administration disputes the ceasefire terms and maintains an active U.S. blockade.
content: The Strait of Hormuz has remained almost completely closed as the U.S. and Iran have disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡对航运开放，但特朗普称美国封锁仍在继续
zh.summary: 伊朗宣布关键的霍尔木兹海峡对航运开放，但特朗普政府对停火条款有异议，并维持美国的活跃封锁。

title: Kevin Warsh wants to lead a scandal-ridden Fed. His wealth is a complication
summary: Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh faces scrutiny over his financial disclosures and wealth holdings. Senator Elizabeth Warren is raising concerns about potential conflicts and complications his assets could pose to his nomination.
content: Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., is calling attention to potential issues in the Fed chair nominee's financial disclosures.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什欲领导陷入丑闻的美联储 其财富成阻碍
zh.summary: 美联储主席候选人凯文·沃什因财务披露和财产状况面临审查。参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦对其资产可能对其提名造成的潜在冲突和复杂问题提出了担忧。

title: Three things to know about FISA Section 702: Congress passes short-term extension of controversial surveillance program
summary: Congress approved a short-term extension of FISA Section 702, maintaining the controversial surveillance program that allows U.S. government monitoring of non-Americans communicating with Americans.
content: The law allows the U.S. government to surveil people outside the U.S., including when they're communicating with American citizens.

zh.title: 关于FISA第702条款需要知道的三件事：国会通过争议性监控计划的短期延期
zh.summary: 国会批准了FISA第702条款的短期延期，维持了允许美国政府监控与美国人通信的非美国人的争议性监控计划。

title: Iran has declared the Strait of Hormuz ‘completely open.’ Here’s what that really means.
summary: Nearly seven weeks after Middle East conflict began, Iran announced the strategic Strait of Hormuz is fully open for commercial oil shipping during the Lebanon-Israel ceasefire.
content: Almost seven weeks after the start of the conflict in the Middle East, Iran announced on Friday that a crucial maritime passageway for seaborne oil was “completely open” for commercial vessels — but only as long as the Lebanon-Israel cease-fire agreement is in effect.

title: Netflix was long 'a builder not a buyer.' Is that era over?
